meta.title: REVAMPED Certification | Sustainable Computer Builds
meta.description: Learn about our exclusive REVAMPED certification – guaranteeing sustainability, quality and performance in every computer we build.

hero.title: The REVAMPED Certification
hero.subtitle: Every computer we build receives our exclusive REVAMPED label – a guarantee of sustainability, quality and performance that sets a new standard in the industry.

inAction.title: Real REVAMPED Computers in Action
inAction.subtitle: Sustainable technology that people love to use. Our REVAMPED certification isn't just a promise – it's a visible commitment to quality and environmental responsibility.

meaning.title: What "REVAMPED" Means
meaning.subtitle: Our certification is more than a label – it's a comprehensive standard ensuring every computer meets our strict criteria for sustainability, quality and performance.

pillars.title: Sustainability First
pillars.description: We prioritise used and refurbished components wherever possible, drastically reducing environmental impact while maintaining peak performance. We apply circular economy principles to every build.

pillars.title: Quality Guaranteed
pillars.description: Every component is thoroughly tested, cleaned and verified to meet our strict performance and reliability standards. Quality is never compromised for sustainability.

pillars.title: AI-Optimised
pillars.description: Our AI ensures perfect component compatibility and optimal performance tuning for your specific use case. Every build is intelligently designed around your needs.

certificate.title: Certificate of Authenticity
certificate.subtitle: Every REVAMPED computer comes with a detailed certificate providing full transparency about your sustainable build.
items: CO₂ emissions saved versus new build
certificate.digitalDesc: Your certificate includes both a physical sticker and a digital QR code for instant verification and detailed component information.

stickers.title: The REVAMPED Label Collection
stickers.subtitle: Each design represents our commitment to sustainable computing and quality assurance.

original.title: Original Design
original.description: Clean, professional certification mark emphasising our laptop-focused sustainability approach.

eco.title: Eco Variant
eco.description: Extended design highlighting our environmental focus and circular economy principles.

digital.title: Digital Certificate
digital.description: QR-code-linked verification system with blockchain-backed authenticity records.

cta.title: Join the REVAMPED Revolution
cta.subtitle: When you choose a REVAMPED computer, you're not just getting a great machine – you're making a statement about the future of technology. Sustainable, powerful, and built with purpose.
